task_updates.executor_notes: Updated the documentation set to make the workspace-level Supabase repo the canonical migration source. `README.md` now has a `Database migrations` subsection under `Database Storage` with the separate-repo path, timestamp naming, idempotency rules, `supabase db push` / `supabase db reset`, and a warning against using a bot-local `sql/` folder. `structure.md` no longer shows a fictitious bot-local `supabase/` tree. `docs/payments.md` replaced all ten `sql/payments.sql:NNN` references with stable section-name anchors into `../supabase/migrations/20260411220000_backfill_payments.sql`. `.cursorrules` now uses the requested `../supabase/migrations/` wording, `docs/arca-gidan-shared-supabase-cutover.md` no longer points at the retired `brain-of-bndc/supabase/migrations/` path, and `CLAUDE.md` remains absent. Verification: scoped grep found zero remaining `sql/payments.sql` or `brain-of-bndc/supabase/migrations/` matches across the edited docs, and git status shows exactly the five expected modified documentation files for this batch.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: All five documentation edits are complete. `README.md` now documents the separate workspace-level migration repo, timestamp naming, idempotency requirements, and `supabase db push` / `supabase db reset`. `structure.md` no longer claims a bot-local `supabase/` tree. `docs/payments.md` rewrites the ten legacy `sql/payments.sql:NNN` references to `../supabase/migrations/20260411220000_backfill_payments.sql` with section-name anchors. `.cursorrules` matches the requested `../supabase/migrations/` wording, and `docs/arca-gidan-shared-supabase-cutover.md` no longer references `brain-of-bndc/supabase/migrations/`.
